name: Double Chocolate Cake Mix Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, vegetable oil, and eggs in a bowl. Stir until well blended.
2. Add the chocolate morsels and stir again.
3. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the mixture about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Allow to cool on the pan for 5 minutes, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
